# overlays

Placeholder attrset for Nix overlays; currently empty `{}`, intended to hold named overlay functions consumed by `flake.nix` or `default.nix` at root.

## Contents

| File | Description |
|------|-------------|
| [default.nix](./default.nix) | Exports empty attrset `{}`; add named overlays as `name = (final: prev: {...})` entries. |

## Usage Pattern

Extend by adding attrs keyed by overlay name:

```nix
my-overlay = import ./my-overlay;
```

Each value must be overlay function `(final: prev: {...})`. Root `flake.nix` and `overlay.nix` consume this set.

## File Relationships

`overlays/default.nix` → imported by root [`overlay.nix`](../overlay.nix) and/or [`flake.nix`](../flake.nix). Custom packages live in [`pkgs/`](../pkgs/) — wire them here via overlays to expose into nixpkgs scope.
